details.test: Task 1: Schedule earliest standard AC repair on Saturday 9-11 AM
Task 2: Request quote for highest-rated high-efficiency furnace under 3500
Task 3: Purchase cheapest annual heating & cooling maintenance plan under 200
Task 4: Book duct cleaning with qualifying promotion
Task 5: Submit emergency heating service request after 8 PM
Task 6: Schedule installation of qualifying smart thermostat
Task 7: Start financing request for $5000 new air conditioner using 0% APR plan
Task 8: Request consultation for IAQ service from article recommendation
